intendedPlayerFacingMeaning: Pull overstaying groups back toward their reference lower-field share without changing late groups.
invariantsPreserved: group 4 and group 5 cannot be allowed to regress
path family remains canonical for touched groups
scoreable route baseline is preserved unless a later measured route probe says otherwise

lowerFieldOverstayReduction.semanticMeaning: Reduce lower-field overstay by translating target lower-field share into runtime lower-field bias controls.
lowerFieldOverstayReduction.expectedVisibleEffect: Moves the affected group vertically and changes late lower-field dwell, but the lowerFieldShare transfer function is not proven for Stage 7.
lowerFieldOverstayReduction.proofHarnessRequired: future Stage 7 lower-field expressibility proof plus challenge-motion-profile and strict challenge-stage conformance

whyMoreLikelyThanBlindTuning: Groups are selected from measured lower-field deltas and the new share is generated from the lower-field gate.
